svg.text: Spec 2 — Reliable, URL-Encoded, Persistent Search Filters
Mobile 390×844 · Desktop 1440×900 · States: Default / 1 filter / 3+ filters / Empty results / Disabled chip

g.text: No filters applied · Tap chips below to filter
URL is the source of truth — every filter
toggle calls pushState; back-nav restores state.
Summary bar visible — chips removable individually
active. Tap × to remove individual filter.
Sidebar filters (sticky) + summary bar mirror state
NDLS New Delhi → BCT Mumbai Central
URL is the source of truth — share, bookmark, back-nav all work.
State mirrored in URL + summary bar above.
• Filters in sidebar — no URL change on toggle
• "Available only" is one binary toggle, ambiguous about RAC/WL
• Filter combinations sometimes silently yield 0 results — no explanation
• Cannot share a filtered view with a family member
• Filters in URL — every toggle calls pushState
• Back navigation restores filter state perfectly
• Granular availability chips: Available / RAC / WL ≤ 50 / WL > 50
• Disabled chips with tooltip explain "0 results if you toggle this"
• Shareable URL — family members open same filtered view
• Empty state suggests which filter to drop, with one-tap action
